header.avatarModalDescription: Upload a new image so attendees recognize you instantly.

home.insightOne: We noticed your event keeps growing, take advantage and engage even more with the interaction tools.
home.insightTwo: Make the most of the interaction tools available to boost your results.

newEvent.uploadHint: Upload a photo so people can learn more about your event
newEvent.uploadDrop: Drag and drop or click to upload

privacy.title: Private event?
privacy.subTitle: Private for guests only
privacy.description: Private events will not appear to the general audience, but they can show up for your followers or only for the guests you invite.
privacy.invitesDescription: Send invites to specific followers or even to friends who still do not have the app. A personalised invite will reach them with all the event details.
privacy.commentsDescription: Public events appear in the events feed, where people can like, comment and share.

categories.title: Add a category to your event
categories.duplicateMessage: This category has already been added.
categories.addModalDescription: Create a custom category for this event.
